meaning: n.接缝,线缝,缝合线,衔接口,伤疤,层vt.缝合,接合,焊合,使留下伤痕vi.裂开,发生裂痕
examples: The skirt ripped along a seam.
Her dress had split along the seam.
The average coal seam here is three feet thick.
The drill also went through a coal seam at 660m that nobody knew existed.
Although it does have the disadvantage of not playing on seam-friendly surfaces at home.
